shadcn-html v0.1.0
GitHub

Overview

Introduction Token System Setup agents.md

Components

Button Dialog Sheet Card Accordion Tabs Dropdown Toast Combobox Toggle

shadcn-html / setup

Setup

Three files. No config. No npm. No build step.

1

Include Tailwind v4 CDN

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@tailwindcss/browser@4"></script>

For production, use the Tailwind v4 CLI to generate a static CSS file instead.

2

Define tokens + Tailwind bridge

<style type="text/tailwindcss">
  @custom-variant dark (&:is(.dark *));
  @theme inline {
    --color-primary:            var(--primary);
    --color-primary-foreground: var(--primary-foreground);
    --color-border:             var(--border);
    --radius-lg:                var(--radius);
    /* copy full bridge from theme/theme.css */
  }

  :root {
    --primary:            oklch(0.205 0.005 285);
    --primary-foreground: oklch(0.985 0.002 247);
    --radius:             0.625rem;
    /* copy full token set from tokens/tokens.css */
  }
  .dark { /* dark values */ }
</style>
3

Copy component styles + wire JS

/* Copy from documentation/css/components/button.css */
.btn { ... }
.btn[data-variant="default"] { ... }

/* Then use in HTML */
<button class="btn" data-variant="default">
  Get started
</button>
4

Point AI agents to agents.md

# In your AI system prompt or context file:
Read agents.md before writing any UI code.
Use the token utilities. Read patterns/ before
implementing interactive components.

The agents.md file is the AI's operating contract for this system.
